name: Canvas Rectangle Laundry Basket - Brightroom™: Steel & Wood Frame, 70L Capacity, 2 Handles, Multipurpose Clothes Basket
description:
Upgrade your laundry routine with this Canvas Rectangle Laundry Basket from Brightroom™. Featuring a rectangular shape with an open top, this fabric laundry basket showcases a cream-color silhouette and two wooden handles in light brown for easy lifting and carrying from room to room. Whether you’re sorting clothes, towels or linens, the multipurpose basket is the perfect companion to meet your household needs.

Brightroom™: See your space in a new light.
